Witness Name: Paul Southin
Statement No.: WITN08350100
Dated: 9 January 2024

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF PAUL SOUTHIN

I, Paul Southin, will say as follows:

Introduction

1. This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry (the
"Inquiry") with the matters set out in the Rule 9 Request dated 23.8.23 (the
"Request").

2. I have received advice and assistance from a lawyer in the preparation of this
statement.

My professional background

3. I am a former employee of POL and worked in a number of roles between 2000
and 2020. I have listed those roles below, to the best of my recollection. Prior to

Page 1 of 29
